title: Summer Kottu Cookout
description: Beat the summer heat with us — kottu off the griddle, lawn cricket, and good company by the river. All friends and family welcome.

title: Welcome Week Tabling
description: New to campus? Stop by our table during Welcome Week to meet the board, grab a snack, and learn what SLSA is all about.

title: Fall Welcome Mixer
description: Our first big social of the year. Meet fellow Sri Lankan students and friends of the island over short eats and games.

title: Sri Lankan Food Night
location: St. Paul Student Center, North Star Ballroom
description: Egg hoppers, string hoppers, kottu, and watalappan for dessert. Our most popular event of the semester — RSVP so we cook enough!

title: Cricket Watch Party
description: Big match, big screen, big snacks. Wear your colours and come cheer with us. Chai and short eats provided.

title: Cultural Showcase — Open Practice
location: Barbara Barker Center for Dance, Studio 100
description: Learning a dance or song for our end-of-year showcase? Come to open practice — no experience needed, just bring energy.

title: Deepavali Celebration
description: Celebrate the festival of lights with us — sweets, diyas, music, and community. Open to everyone.

title: Sigiriya Trivia & Chai Night
description: How well do you know the pearl of the Indian Ocean? Team trivia, prizes, and bottomless chai to keep you warm.

title: End-of-Semester Study Break
description: Finals are coming. Take a breather with us — tea, short eats, and a moment to destress before the grind.

title: Avurudu — Sinhala & Tamil New Year
description: Our biggest celebration of the year. Traditional games, kiribath and kavum, music, and the warmth of home. Bring everyone you know.
